001package guiDiscussion;
002
003import applicationMain.DiscussionService;
004import entityClasses.User;
005
006/*******
007 * <p> Title: ModelDiscussionBoard Class. </p>
008 *
009 * <p> Description: The Discussion Board Model. This model centralizes data operations for
010 * discussion posts and replies so the controller can focus on coordinating user actions and
011 * view updates. </p>
012 *
013 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2026 </p>
014 *
015 * @author TP2 Team
016 *
017 * @version 1.00 2026-03-18 Initial version
018 */
019public class ModelDiscussionBoard {
020
021        private final DiscussionService discussionService;
022
023        /**
024         * Default constructor that wires this model to the shared DiscussionService.
025         */
026        public ModelDiscussionBoard() {
027                discussionService = DiscussionService.getInstance();
028        }
029
030        /**
031         * Returns formatted text for all posts and their replies.
032         *
033         * @return formatted discussion board text
034         */
035        public String readAllPostsText() {
036                return discussionService.listAllPostsText();
037        }
038
039        /**
040         * Creates a new post.
041         *
042         * @param title post title from the view
043         * @param body post body from the view
044         * @param authorAsuUserId current user's ASU user id
045         * @return null when successful, otherwise an error message
046         */
047        public String createPost(String title, String body, String authorAsuUserId) {
048                return discussionService.createPost(title, body, authorAsuUserId);
049        }
050
051        /**
052         * Updates an existing post identified by title.
053         *
054         * @param titleInput current title used to locate the post
055         * @param newTitleInput new title value (optional)
056         * @param newBodyInput new body value (optional)
057         * @return null when successful, otherwise an error message
058         */
059        public String updatePostByTitle(String titleInput, String newTitleInput, String newBodyInput) {
060                return discussionService.updatePostByTitle(titleInput, newTitleInput, newBodyInput);
061        }
062
063        /**
064         * Deletes a post identified by title.
065         *
066         * @param titleInput post title to delete
067         * @return null when successful, otherwise an error message
068         */
069        public String deletePostByTitle(String titleInput) {
070                return discussionService.deletePostByTitle(titleInput);
071        }
072
073        /**
074         * Returns formatted post subset text for a keyword.
075         *
076         * @param keyword keyword provided by the user
077         * @return formatted post subset text
078         */
079        public String searchPostsByKeywordText(String keyword) {
080                return discussionService.listPostSubsetByKeywordText(keyword);
081        }
082
083        /**
084         * Creates a reply for the post identified by title.
085         *
086         * @param postTitleInput post title to reply to
087         * @param body reply body
088         * @param authorAsuUserId current user's ASU user id
089         * @return null when successful, otherwise an error message
090         */
091        public String createReplyByPostTitle(String postTitleInput, String body, String authorAsuUserId) {
092                return discussionService.createReplyByPostTitle(postTitleInput, body, authorAsuUserId);
093        }
094
095        /**
096         * Returns formatted replies for the specified post title.
097         *
098         * @param postTitleInput post title to inspect
099         * @return formatted replies text or an error message
100         */
101        public String listRepliesForPostTitle(String postTitleInput) {
102                return discussionService.listRepliesForPostTitle(postTitleInput);
103        }
104
105        /**
106         * Determines whether this user can delete posts.
107         *
108         * @param user current user
109         * @return true when user has admin or staff role; false otherwise
110         */
111        public boolean canDeletePosts(User user) {
112                return user != null && (user.getAdminRole() || user.getStaffRole());
113        }
114}
